articles.title: Waterfall, Provo River Frontispiece
articles.notes: The provided PDF pages (646-649) contain advertisements and the table of contents page, but do not include the frontispiece. A frontispiece is typically an illustration or photograph placed at the beginning of a publication, opposite the title page. The 'Waterfall, Provo River' would likely be a photographic image rather than text content, and would appear much earlier in the magazine than the pages provided.
